hooks.command: echo "=== CLAUDE.md — repository constitution (authoritative, current version — re-read before acting) ==="; echo; cat CLAUDE.md; echo; echo "=== Enforcement: before changing code, docs, tests, config, naming, or public behavior, read the governing strategy documents referenced above (shared strategy/ directory) and state which govern your decision. The hook enforces freshness; CLAUDE.md remains the constitution. ==="
